nasb.text: I have confidence in you in the Lord that you will adopt no other view; but the one who is disturbing you will bear his judgment, whoever he is.

esv.text: I have confidence in the Lord that you will take no other view, and the one who is troubling you will bear the penalty, whoever he is.

cnv.text: 我在主裡深信你們不會存別的意念；但那攪擾你們的，無論是誰，必定要受刑罰。

ccb.text: 我在主里深信你们不会有二心，但无论谁搅扰你们，都必受审判。

csbs.text: 我在主里深信你们不会有别的思想；不过那搅扰你们的，无论他是谁，都将受到惩罚。
